net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.util

Class CabinGenerator

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.util.CabinGenerator

  • public class CabinGenerator
extends java.lang.Object
    This class contains all constructors for the different elements of the cabin. You can construct every single part of cabin on its own.
    Since:
    0.5
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    marc.engelmann
    See Also:
    for implementation example.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      CabinGenerator(Cabin cabin)
      This method is the constructor of this class.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void clearCabin()
      This method clears all objects from the cabin object excluding the passenger classes.
      void createClass(TravelOption travelOption)
      This method creates a class and the subclasses (seats, rows, etc.).
      void createCurtain(boolean openOrNot, java.lang.String name)
      This method creates a curtain.
      void createDoor(DoorOption option, boolean symmetrical, int id, int yPosition)
      This function creates a door.
      void createPhysicalObject(ObjectOption option, int xDimension)
      This method creates the physical objects except for seats!.
      void createRow()
      This function creates a row and the seats in it.
      void createSeat(Row row)
      This method creates a new seat.
      Cabin getCabin()
      Returns the cabin.
      void splitSeatString(java.lang.String seatString)
      This method splits the String into parts and reads out the information in it.
      void switchSettings(TravelOption travelOption)
      Load the class settings depending on type.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • CabinGenerator

        public CabinGenerator(Cabin cabin)
        This method is the constructor of this class.
        Parameters:
        cabin - the cabin element

    • Method Detail

      • getCabin

        public Cabin getCabin()
        Returns the cabin.
        Returns:
        the cabin that was created within this class.

      • clearCabin

        public void clearCabin()
        This method clears all objects from the cabin object excluding the passenger classes. These are removed in a later step.

      • switchSettings

        public void switchSettings(TravelOption travelOption)
        Load the class settings depending on type. NOTE: This only works if there is just one existing class per class type.
        Parameters:
        travelOption - the subclass

      • splitSeatString

        public void splitSeatString(java.lang.String seatString)
        This method splits the String into parts and reads out the information in it. This string has the form X-X and it is separated by the "-" operator.
        Parameters:
        seatString - is the string

      • createPhysicalObject

        public void createPhysicalObject(ObjectOption option,
                                 int xDimension)
        This method creates the physical objects except for seats!.
        Parameters:
        option - the option
        xDimension - the x dimension

      • createSeat

        public void createSeat(Row row)
        This method creates a new seat.
        Parameters:
        row - is the row in which the seat should be generated

      • createClass

        public void createClass(TravelOption travelOption)
        This method creates a class and the subclasses (seats, rows, etc.).
        Parameters:
        travelOption - is the subclass

      • createRow

        public void createRow()
        This function creates a row and the seats in it.

      • createDoor

        public void createDoor(DoorOption option,
                       boolean symmetrical,
                       int id,
                       int yPosition)
        This function creates a door.
        Parameters:
        option - the option
        symmetrical - describes if the door will be generated on both sides
        id - is the id of the door
        yPosition - set it to -1 to ignore value, only important for emergency exit.

      • createCurtain

        public void createCurtain(boolean openOrNot,
                          java.lang.String name)
        This method creates a curtain. Curtains are generated automatically in the class generation.
        Parameters:
        openOrNot - describes whether the curtain is open or not.
        name - is the name of the door.
